content.en:
Subsequently, Ye Tian continued to look for and collect this Dark Gold Ruin Stone, and then refined the Dark Gold Ruin Liquid.

This Dark Golden Ruin Liquid had some effect on him, but he would give it to his son Ye Xingchen, as well as his wife and daughter, to help them improve their Ultimate Will, and their hopes of breaking through to the Ultimate Realm Lord in the future would greatly increase.

this day.

Ye Tian gathered enough Dark Gold Ruins Liquid and temporarily left the Ultimate Dark Domain.

......

Multidimensional territory.

Terran Temple.

Ye Tian brought back the Dark Gold Ruins Liquid, and Ye Xingchen also returned from the Sea of Dimensions.

"Father!"

Ye Xingchen said respectfully.

Ye Tian directly took out a bottle of Dark Gold Ruin Liquid, which contained a small void inside, storing a lot of Dark Gold Ruin Liquid.

"Xingchen, this is the Dark Gold Ruin Liquid, which can enhance your Ultimate Will, and the effect is very good, so many Dark Gold Ruin Liquid should help you greatly improve your Ultimate Will, and it can greatly increase your hope of breaking through the Ultimate Realm Lord!"

Ye Tian said.

You must know that when he was at the peak of the Nine Realms, he had never encountered such a good thing, but that was no way, he had no backer at that time, and even if he was a backer, he was reluctant to take out this kind of good thing to cultivate him.

That is to say, he can easily obtain the Dark Gold Ruins Liquid, and if he is another Ultimate Realm Lord, he has to work hard to have any hope of seizing it.

Who willing?

"Thank you, father!"

Ye Xingchen excitedly took over the bottle of Dark Gold Ruin Liquid.

Afterwards, he went back to retreat to refine the Dark Gold Ruin Liquid.

......

Ye Xingchen took out a drop of dark gold ruin liquid and refined it.

Rumble!!!!

Pure energy poured into the ultimate will and was refined.

His ultimate will is constantly compressed and tempered, and it grows rapidly.

"What a powerful effect!"

Ye Xingchen found that he still underestimated the effect of the Dark Gold Ruins Liquid, which was countless times more powerful than the resources he had obtained in the past, and those resources were not qualified to compare with this kind of treasure at all.

I don't know where his father got this treasure, it's just too precious.

Even if it was a drop of dark gold ruin liquid, placed in the Sea of Dimensions, it was estimated that it would be able to kill a group of powerhouses at the peak of the Nine Realms for this, but he had so many.

"So much Dark Gold Ruin Liquid is enough to raise my (CJCI's) Ultimate Will to the extreme of the Nine Realms Peak, to the point where it can no longer be improved, and the success rate of breaking through the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm in the future is definitely close to one hundred percent!"

Ye Xingchen said secretly.

Then, he continued to refine the dark gold ruin liquid, and the ultimate will skyrocketed.

Time flies.

After a long time, Ye Xingchen had exhausted these dark gold ruins, but his ultimate will had already been raised to an extremely terrifying level, and he could barely improve it anymore.

So, on this day, Ye Xingchen informed his father Ye Tian.

Soon.

A replica of Ye Tian's body came and looked at his son.

He deduced it a little, and roughly determined that Ye Xingchen's current breakthrough chance was about a ninety out of five chance.

If you break through with the help of some resources, you can probably increase it to ninety-nine, which is already nearly one hundred percent, and there is no need to continue to wait for the Ultimate Ancient Sea to be born.

In fact, even with the help of the Ultimate Ancient Sea, the success rate of the breakthrough is at most 9.99 percent, and it will not reach 100% in theory.

"Xingchen, are you willing to hit the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm right now?"

Ye Tian told him about Ye Xingchen's success rate.

Ye Xingchen immediately decided, "Father, I am willing to impact the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm right now. "

"Good!"

Ye Tian took out some resources for him to help him impact the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm.

Afterwards.

"Here we go!"

Ye Xingchen began to impact the main realm of the Ultimate Realm, breaking through with the Ten Thousand Stars Ultimate System.

......

"The stars should break through, no problem. "

Ye Tian's deduction was like this, but he was still a little worried, staring at Ye Xingchen all the time.

Time passed.

this day.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Xingchen successfully left traces at the end of the Ten Thousand Stars Ultimate System, occupied the quota of this Ultimate System, and broke through to become the Ultimate Realm Master.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

Soon, Ye Xingchen's body transformation was completed.

"Father, I broke through!" Ye Xingchen said excitedly.

"Very good, let's go back and retreat for a while!" Ye Tian said with relief.

Soon.

The matter of Ye Xingchen's breakthrough to the Ultimate Realm Lord spread throughout the nine Ultimate Forces in the Multidimensional Territory, and even gradually spread to the many Ultimate Forces in the entire Dimensional Sea.

Countless Nine Realm peaks were extremely envious of Ye Xingchen, with such a powerful father, it was too easy to break through to the Ultimate Realm Lord.

They couldn't wait to replace Ye Xingchen by themselves, in that case, they would be able to break through to the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm.

Another long time has passed.

Ye Tian began to focus on cultivating his wife and daughters, helping them to improve the ultimate will and strengthen the ultimate rules.

However, they were not so eager to cultivate, so their progress was a little slower.

Similarly, Ye Tian himself was also working hard to cultivate, and the Ultimate Dark Rules, Eternal Night Ultimate Rules, and Abyssal Star Ultimate Rules were all rapidly improving.

Especially the Ultimate Dark Ultimate Rule, the fastest progress, under Ye Tian's crazy deduction and analysis, after a long time, he finally raised this Ultimate Dark Ultimate Rule to the three hundred realm.

With the improvement of the Darkness Ultimate Rule, Ye Tian's Darkness Ultimate Body has also improved a lot, and he is about to start getting started.

In the following days, Ye Tian collected a large number of resources to prepare for the entry of the Darkest Ultimate Body.

......

The ultimate dark domain.

Ye Tian was still in retreat, countless resources had been consumed by him, and his body was still transforming.

I don't know how long it has been, but finally on this day, Ye Tian's Darkest Ultimate Body began to enter.

Rumble!!!!

The Darkest Ultimate Body has transformed and reached the entry realm, and its physical strength is much stronger than in the past.

"It's done, the Darkest Ultimate Body is the entry, my current strength should surpass that of the Heavenly Realm Lord, but it's a little worse than that ultimate creature. "

Ye Tian said.

But even if it was only a little closer, he would still not be much weaker when he killed the ultimate creature, and if several replica bodies were on it together, it would be enough to crush each other.

It can be said that he is now in the Sea of Dimensions, and he is undoubtedly at the top of the Ultimate Realm Lord.

However.

At this moment, Ye Tian's body sensed a summons.

"What's going on?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.
